feedback.text: As a European citizen, I hope that the focus will also be on protecting video games, just as after buying a car that the company could decide to remove your keys or access to it because it is not profitable for you to keep it and it is always yourself, the video games should be the same, once you buy it, it should always be yours and have access to as long as you want (except perhaps entirely online titles such as MMORPGs or similar...). I hope that the European Union will listen to the hundreds of thousands of European citizens (and beyond Europe) who have already signed similar petitions such as ‘Stop killing games’ and take action to protect us from bad practices and abuse of companies.
